entry.title: You can say goodbye to cold sores forever. Yes, it is actually possible. For real.
entry.summary: Have you ever had a cold sore? Has it made you feel embarrassed about being seen? Well, guess what? You're…
entry.content:
Have you ever had a cold sore? Has it made you feel embarrassed about being seen? Well, guess what? You're not alone. And for so long you've had the burning question: Could cold sores ever go away? Well, the answer is yes! And, it's so much simpler than you think.

Listen, we just want you to know that you don't have to live with this issue anymore. You can actually do something good and permanent about it. There is hope. No longer would you have to feel insecure about going on dates or anxious about choosing a partner. No longer do you have to be worried about a breakout sneaking up on you. No longer do you have to keep a bunch of medicated lip balms laying around just in case. You don't have to accept this as your norm anymore. This may sound too good to be true and you are not at fault for thinking that. In fact, most people believe that there is no way to heal. After all, you've been told by countless medical professionals and Google searches that there is no cure. Well, the truth is, any disease can be healed.

According to the World Health Organization, approximately 64% of people around the world suffer from this annoying and embarrassing matter. The hard truth is: the culprit for those pesky breakouts is the herpes simplex virus or herpes for short. Breakouts can happen on your face or even…down there. While there are are about eight types of herpes, there are two main ones: HSV 1 and HSV 2. HSV 1 typically causes sores on the face while HSV 2 causes sores on the genital area. HSV 1 is the most common. Herpes is so sinister that you may have never had a cold sore outbreak, yet it is still possible that this virus is quietly using you as a host, making you asymptomatic. We believe that a great number of people carry this virus silently without knowing it because many people can get it from people they don't even know have it. That's because the virus still sheds without symptoms present. You might think it's no big deal since you don't get blisters or since you've managed to get rid of your outbreaks; however, for some, this virus can lead to more serious complications such as keratitis, encephalitis, meningitis, dementia, blindness, and other disorders. HSV can also increase your chance of contracting and transmitting HIV. The thing about the herpes virus is that it likes to hide out in discreet places in your body. It hijacks your cells, replicates rapidly and silently as it reshapes your DNA and causes damage.

In 2021, Marla Paul wrote in an article at Northwestern University Feinberg School of Medicine that, "more than half of U.S. adults are carriers of HSV1 (herpes simplex virus type 1) which hibernates in the peripheral nervous system and can never be eradicated." For decades, almost every single article or piece of literature have concluded that there is no cure for herpes. And, you too, have believed this to be true and have accepted a life sentence, subscribing to an indefinite membership of synthetic herpes medications like Valtrex, Acyclovir, Valacyclovir, or Famciclovir. Frankly, most of those drugs are only meant to treat or suppress the sores. They are only designed to address surface symptoms and not the deep rooted causes of illness. And, honestly, that is just a form of imprisonment. Many even think that supplements like L-lysine healed them. The bad news is that, it hasn't. L-lysine is just an amino acid that blocks the outbreaks from physically manifesting but the virus is still laying low in your body. The good news is that this virus, though it has been deemed "incurable" for decades, is possible to eliminate. Now, while there is some truth that there is no "cure" to the herpes simplex virus (because you can't necessarily kill the virus), you can find it's hiding place and escort it out of your body. It is actually so much more straightforward than you think. That is why we created a step-by-step, easy to follow protocol (including videos and images) on how to eradicate this virus and kick it out of your body for good. No bs. No fluff. Just a clear strategic plan. You can achieve real and lasting results. You'll not only be able to get rid of herpes, but you may find relief from other ailments as well. That is a win, win.

After years of research and dedication to disintegrating the myth that there is no way to heal from herpes, we have finally discovered and understood how this disease-causing virus operates and how to find and eradicate it. After dedicating over a year of research, we have compounded lots of information to get to this point, but won't bore you with pages upon pages of research details. Instead, we've managed to summarize the meat and potatoes—the most important aspects—for you. This has been so exciting because we are able to help people who have been desperate for a solution for a very long time. This was made with pure love and intention, just for you because you deserve it. You deserve to live a life of freedom. You deserve to be happy. You deserve to see the light at the end of the tunnel and we can't be more ecstatic for you! This for the person who has tried countless different ways to heal and is on the verge of giving up and just accepting their fate, but just know that "the most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time." —Thomas Edison. Try one more time. You can get through this despite popular belief. You have power over your health. Take back control today!

Alright, so now here's the exciting part! A very significant ingredient in this remedy that we've discovered is carvacrol. This is the secret sauce of our protocol. Carvacrol is a powerful and natural antiviral, antifungal, and antimicrobial polyphenol agent that is found in a few herbs. It just works, period. And, with no side effect that is comparable to synthetic pharmaceutical medications but it must be used correctly. You will learn how to use it effectively in the protocol. The main and most common plant that contains potent carvacrol is oregano. But not just any oregano. There are two main kinds of oregano: Greek and Mexican. Mexican oregano is very well known. Most people use it in their seasoning rotation or on their favorite pizza; however, Mexican oregano has a very low and sometimes zero carvacrol content. Greek oregano, on the other hand, is true liquid gold. It grows wild in rocky and sunny Mediterranean hills and has a much higher carvacrol content averaging around 70%. Other alternative herbs that include high carvacrol content include thyme (specifically the thymus captitatus species) and Dittany of Crete. These are both Greek plants as well.

In our protocol, we will be using 100% Greek oil of oregano (also known as oregano essential oil), not oregano oil. There is a very big difference. It is also important to note that oil of oregano should be wild, steam distilled, 100% pure, undiluted and should have a Certificate of Analysis (COA) document to verify the potency, purity, and safety of the batch. There are plenty of oregano oils on the market with many claiming that their product is lab tested but have no COA and are often pre-diluted with olive oil or other oils. Additionally, many of them are not made from the plant species Origanum vulgare ssp. hirtum, which is true Greek oregano. We have found probably the best available oil of oregano product that is made and packaged in Greece but if you prefer to source your own, we encourage you to browse around to find other high quality alternatives as well, including Thymus Captitatus and Dittany of Crete. When selecting oil of oregano, you should know the species, the source (where it's grown), the carvacrol percentage, and the expiration date. For a limited time, we have included a complimentary full size oil with the purchase of our protocol at no additional cost to you. While supplies last!

In the protocol, you'll learn the specific ways that oil of oregano must be administered in order to expose and attack the herpes simplex virus. You will also be guided with exactly the types of foods and other supporting herbs to eat. Additionally, there are some vital steps that must be done prior to using the oil. You will learn exactly what to do in the protocol. We're confident that you can be healed as long as you follow the instructions and stick to the plan. Alright, it's time to break up with herpes for good! And, now that you have some insight, let's kick some…virass! You get it? Ah! Corny, we know. Anyway, if you are ready to kick the virus out and be freed from the stigma and shame, then you are at the right place.

Break the Cycle. For Good.

Be the first to be notified when the protocol is live.

🔒 Your privacy is fully protected. 100% confidential priority list.

🎉

You're on the list!

Your priority spot has been successfully secured. No further action is required on your part. We will reach out via email the moment the protocol goes live.

What Some Beta Phase Participants Say

Real voices just like yours from individuals who have participated in this protocol.

"Thanks a ton! Oregano oil completely knocked out my pneumonia too!!! The cilantro juice and the oil made me feel awful at first, but I understand now that it was just the infection clearing out of my system. Wowww!"

JG

"Almost three weeks in on nothing but fruits and berries. Honestly, I still got processed food cravings sometimes, but I kept pushing because of how amazing my body was feeling."

Todd

"I haven't had a single breakout in 90 days and my skin looks amazing! Eating raw and using the oil has me feeling amazing and in the best shape of my life. Nature really works! Holy s&!%!"

Barbara

"I really value this information. I do admit that most, if not all herpes cures or remedies are a joke and won't work. I have been juicing and taking the oregano oil for a month now and notice a big difference in how I feel and that things are getting better. I know that things don't happen overnight but I can tell you that it's making a big difference." — Brian

"Today is my day 145. I am going strong with God's help. Not once have I cheated or even thought about it and I cook for people all the time. This is important to me and so I will do everything it takes. This process is hard as heck but nothing is impossible with God on the front line. Your mind is a powerful tool and you have to control it. You have to believe in what you are doing and stay disciplined. Pray and do the natural while God does the supernatural." —anonymous

"So I got my numbers from my first igG test! HSV2 = 6.52. I don't know where I was to start but this is great news for me! I say another 5 months and I will remove it fully! Everybody keep pushing! You got this!" — anonymous

"I'm almost 3 weeks in. 100% berries/fruits. I'll be honest, I do get tempted to eat processed food sometimes. However, my body has never felt better." — JG

"I went raw fruit and veg with the oregano oil and on day 100 did a test and was negative. I'm also getting another test from a different company for a second opinion." — Mir

"I just tested 1.55 for HSV 1! I haven't had a breakout since. I'm almost there!" — anonymous

"Don't let anyone tell you different…you can cure ALL diseases!" — Tony

"I've been on the detox going on 5 months. I've been tested twice. My numbers last December were HSV 1 was 12.7 and HSV 2 was 7.5. My first test since starting was HSV 1 is 3.5 and HSV 2 is 4.4. Now HSV 1 is 1.5 and HSV 2 was 3.4. I'm assuming the detox is working right? I really pray that in the next few months, I get that negative result!" — Jonny

"Talking to your health care provider…you know they will say NOT TO DO IT! It's either we figure it out on our own…or use the Dr!" — GG

"I have been doing this for over 7 months. It is now safe to say that this works. I had so many outbreaks before I started this treatment. It took a little adjusting to a raw diet but after a few months, it became really easy for me. I tested negative yesterday!" — Dolly

"I've been doing this for about two months down now and my index dropped already! Thanks so much." — anonymous

"I am one of the people that this worked very well on. Herpes is not that hard to cure once you follow the tips. I am now still following the same foods and have changed my life for the better." — Dan

"I have not had an outbreak in 90 days. My skin looks amazing. I am ripped as he** and I feel incredible from eating raw and using the oil…nature works, holy s&^%!" — Todd

"Thank you so much!! You cured my pneumonia with oregano oil too! I felt really sick after juicing cilantro and using oregano oil. Now I get it. It was my pneumonia virus dying off…" — Barbara

"Oregano oil really works! I didn't even have to use two bottles and I wasn't perfect ewith the oregano diet either! No more breakouts after about 3 months of using the oil…this stuff is awesome!" — anonymous

"Thanks for helping me get rid of this issue! Why some people still believe in the traditional system is appalling to me! I got rid of my issue the right way and for good with all your tips! Only the body can truly heal itself. There is always light at the end of the tunnel." — Barbara

"So far, my friend started this and it has been working. She was on prescription meds from the doctor and her outbreaks always come back. She started eating raw vegetables and fruits and the oregano and coconut oil. So far, no breakouts and she has lost a lot of weight. She doesn't have to be on blood pressure meds anymore either. She hasn't been tested yet, but she will." — anonymous

"I am finally done with this issue. Nature does work but people are so brainwashed, it's not even funny. Just follow along and you will get better." — Isabella

Listen, if it's possible for them, then it is definitely possible for you too! "Every accomplishment starts with the decision to try." — John F. Kennedy. And, remember, you can do all things through Christ who gives you strength. (Phil 4:13)

Join 500+ others who are using this protocol to support their immune health.
GET THE FULL PROTOCOL
Instant digital download. 100% Secure.



Claim your free 100% pure, undiluted Greek oil of oregano with COA today. (Popup?)

FAQs
Can the virus come back if I stop eating healthy?
People often ask if the virus will return if you adapt an unhealthy eating habit again. And the answer to that is no. However, if you do get exposed again to someone who is carrying the virus, it is possible that you can contract it again. What you need to understand is that bad diet didn't cause the virus, but bad diet made it easy to stay. When your body's defense—the immune system—is clogged up, pathogens sneak through much more easily and they stay and wreak havoc. But once you successfully eradicate the virus, start thinking thrice about who you exchange your next make out session or one night stand with.

How long does this process take to get rid of the virus?
While there is not an exact timeline, it all depends on each individual, igG test numbers, and how well the plan is adhered to. Remember that this is not a get fixed quick scheme. After all you're trying to eradicate something that has been hiding in you for a very long time. Be patient with the process and give yourself grace and time to heal. The sacrifice will be worth it in the end.

Can I leave a video or audio testimonial instead of writing?
Absolutely! We encourage you to send us your voice recordings and videos. We’re in the beta phase of testing out audio and video testimonials and would love for you to submit videos or audio testimonials. We want to know how you feel before and after completing the steps. You don’t have to do both before and after but we recommend that you do at least the after. We want to hear from more voices of real people like you who have real results.

Can make my testimonial anonymous?
Absolutely! Please be encouraged to share your testimonial even without revealing your identity.
Do I get a free oil with my purchase?
For a limited time, each purchase of the herpes healing protocol will receive a free full size bottle of pure, undiluted wild Greek oil of oregano with a COA at no additional cost! While supplies last.

What's included in the limited time bundle offer?
You get the step-by-step PDF guide ($97 value), including a full size pure, undiluted wild Greek oil of oregano ($25 value) for free to help you get started immediately. Total value $122, yours today for just $97. While supplies last.

Is the shipping free?
Yes! Each oil is delivered right to your doorstep with free shipping.

Is there a money back guarantee?
Yes! We offer a "No-Questions-Asked" 30-day money-back guarantee.

Also, please note that nothing on this website or our protocols, is intended to be used as professional or medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. It is strictly for informational purposes only.
Results may vary.
